name: Rooty
desc: A gnarled root pulled straight from the earth. Nothing fancy, but it gets the job done.

name: Snapper
desc: A carnivorous bush with a taste for flies and apparently, potion making. Don't put your fingers near it.

name: Pecker
desc: A foul-tempered goose that somehow figured out alchemy. You didn't teach it. You're afraid to ask.

name: Slush
desc: A gurgling swamp creature of questionable origin. It oozes ingredients you'd rather not identify.
